text: Avrupa Ekonomik Alanı (AEA) üyesi 30 ülke (AB, İzlanda, Lihtenştayn ve Norveç), 110 farklı ulusal belgeyi tek bir ortak sürücü belgesi formatıyla değiştirerek, belgelerin diller arası anlaşılmasını kolaylaştırmıştır.
validation_reason: The nugget accurately states that 30 EEA member states (EU, Iceland, Liechtenstein, and Norway) replaced 110 different national documents with a common driving license format to facilitate cross-language understanding, which is directly supported by the text: 'The European Union has adopted a common format for driving permits within all 30 European Economic Area member states (EU, Iceland, Liechtenstein and Norway)... storage_reason: This nugget explains a significant standardization effort in the EEA, improving cross-language understanding of driving licenses, which is valuable information.
